text:
Arka (アーカ, Āka) Hunter × Hunter Hunter Association Official Issue: Hunter's Guide; Character & World Official Databook (pg. 202) is a player of the game Greed Island. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 14, Chapter 133 

Appearance

Arka is a skinny man of average height. He has a long face with high cheekbones and sharp buck teeth. He is seen wearing a light green shirt with a white loose collar.

Personality

Arka is an opportunist, waiting for Gon and Killua to be caught off guard after one of their first encounters. However, he appears to be a coward, as he quickly retreats once his plan backfires and is forced into a confrontation.

Plot

Greed Island arc

Intent on stealing Gon and Killua's newly-acquired "Sword of Truth" card, he appears right after Motaricke fails to steal the card. Arka uses two "Pickpocket" cards to randomly steal cards the boys have gathered. However, due to the boy's precautionary actions to protect their cards, Arka only manages to steal a single "Rock" card. Running out of tricks and realizing that the boys are too smart for him to trick, he gives up and flees. 

Arka's name is mentioned in Gon's binder when the latter checks to see who is still (alive) inside the game. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 158 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Due to being able to access Greed Island, Arka is capable of utilizing Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Though Arka's name is technically given in the manga through Gon's Greed Island binder, the correspondence between the character and his name is only provided in the Hunter's Guide databook. 

Manga and Anime Differences

Arka does not appear in the 2011 anime adaptation of the series.
